statement.en: Multi-omic profiling of early pregnancy small and large plasma extracellular vesicles reveals placental, metabolic, and structural adaptation signatures
statement.summary: Supplementary tables and figures supporting the manuscript: "Multi-omic profiling of early pregnancy small and large plasma extracellular vesicles reveals placental, metabolic, and structural adaptation signatures"

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint/supplementary material submission (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or pending peer review) presenting empirical biological data. The claims are provisional until peer-reviewed validation. The work describes observational findings (multi-omic profiling) rather than making unfalsifiable claims, but the data interpretation and mechanistic conclusions remain under validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 胎盤と代謝と構造が時間とともに織り交ざり、小さき囊が大きき囊へと変化する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 母なる中核から放たれた小さき使者たちが、二つの道へ分かれて新しき生命の舞台を整える。
